title: poa angustifolia subsp. nymanii
intro: Poa angustifolia subsp. nymanii is a subspecies of the Poa angustifolia plant, commonly known as bluebunch wheatgrass, which is a type of cool-season grass native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia subsp. nymanii include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
